introSection:
Clipper (Japanese: クリッパー) was a steel roller coaster located at Space World in Japan.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.
fullText:
Clipper (Japanese: クリッパー) was a steel roller coaster located at Space World in Japan.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.



Green track and supports.
